_meta.status: live as of Phase C2 of the 2.0 federation work package.
_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002. Shape additions that preserve wire compatibility (new optional response fields) are allowed; breaking changes require a new generation.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Same request shape (issue_ids: list[str], optional reason). Response shape differs: classic dashboard returns {closed: list[IssueDict], errors: list[BatchFailure]} and does NOT compute newly_unblocked; loom returns BatchCloseResponseLoom — succeeded: list[SlimIssueLoom], failed: list[BatchFailure], newly_unblocked: list[SlimIssueLoom] (omitted when empty). Loom's newly_unblocked computation matches MCP batch_close exactly (diff get_ready() before vs. after).
_meta.fixture_scope: Error paths + all-missing-id 200 (failed[0] pins BatchFailure shape). Populated-success shape (succeeded[0] = SlimIssueLoom; newly_unblocked[0] = SlimIssueLoom) is pinned by the seeded test methods TestLoomGenerationParityBatchClose::test_succeeded_populated_shape and ::test_newly_unblocked_populated_shape — those require real issues and dependency wiring that fixture replay cannot provide.

shape_decl.request_type: BatchCloseRequest (issue_ids: list[str], reason?: str, actor?: str)

response_shape.newly_unblocked?: list[SlimIssueLoom]  # omitted entirely when empty (per BatchResponse rule §C2)

shape_decl.rationale: Same envelope as BatchResponse[SlimIssueLoom] but with newly_unblocked also keyed on SlimIssueLoom (the generic BatchResponse hard-codes newly_unblocked to classic SlimIssue, which uses id rather than issue_id and would diverge from loom's vocabulary). Omitted-when-empty preserves the BatchResponse §C2 rule that the field's presence signals an unblock.

examples.name: error_issue_ids_not_list
examples.note: Same validation as classic batch close.

body.error: issue_ids must be a JSON array

examples.name: success_all_missing
examples.note: All-missing close: succeeded empty, failed has one BatchFailure per id, newly_unblocked omitted (no real closes happened so nothing to unblock). Pins BatchFailure shape and the omitted-when-empty rule for newly_unblocked.
